context.role: Ground obstacle that player must jump over, tallest and widest variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=0px (ground level), scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Highest difficulty ground obstacle, requires precise jump timing (25% spawn rate)

visual_specification.shape: Three vertical cacti grouped together with varied heights, desert plant silhouette
visual_specification.details: Three cacti side by side with varied heights (tallest 100px), visible spikes, hitbox 99x97px (3px margin from sprite)

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style as cactus_small and cactus_medium
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (1 cactus), cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti same height), cactus_large has 3 cacti with varied heights up to 100px

explicit_negations: No texture details beyond pixel art style
No shadow or ground connection visual
